description_long: This object is a large, stylized sword with a straight, single-edged blade featuring a prominent fuller running along its length. The blade is metallic and has a sharp, angular tip, giving it a modern or fantasy-inspired appearance. A distinctive circular guard sits between the blade and the handle, providing both protection and a unique visual element. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped or colored in a golden hue, and ends in a small, pointed pommel. The overall design is robust and imposing, suggesting it is intended for display or ceremonial use rather than practical combat. The materials and finish give the sword a sleek, polished look, with metallic and gold tones dominating its appearance.
description: A large, straight-bladed sword with a metallic finish, circular guard, and gold-colored handle. The design is modern and stylized, with a prominent fuller and angular tip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, the circular guard, and the gold handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the circular guard appearing as a line.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the blade, guard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and the linear appearance of the guard.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, gold-colored, smooth, with a pointed pommel
